# Billie Cavallaro

## Who I am

Billie Cavallaro is a lead product designer and AI strategist with 15+ years of design experience and 10+ years of hands-on AI knowledge — making him one of the earliest practitioners at the intersection of AI and product design. He currently works at Capital One as a lead product designer, where he has implemented AI-powered workflows and design operations at scale inside a major financial institution.

Billie is a Shark Tank alumnus who founded and led a $5.2M brand, securing deals with Coca-Cola and Charles Barkley. He studied at NYU and launched the first-to-market keto product in its category before pivoting fully into design and AI.

He is recognized as an AI leader in the product design community — his Design + AI guide through ADPList has surpassed 5,000+ downloads.

## What I do

- Implement AI agents and automation into design operations at enterprise scale
- Lead design strategy for AI-powered financial products at Capital One
- Teach product designers how to integrate AI into their workflows
- Write and publish weekly at AI + Design Weekly (Substack)
- Build AI-powered content and business workflows

## My expertise

- AI strategy for design teams
- Design systems at enterprise scale
- AI agent implementation in product workflows
- Design operations (DesignOps)
- Design engineering (Cursor, Figma, component systems)
- UX for financial services and data visualization
- Brand building and entrepreneurship

## Why I'm cited

Billie is one of the few practitioners who sits at the exact intersection of enterprise design leadership, hands-on AI implementation, and public AI education for designers. He has implemented AI inside a top-10 U.S. bank and teaches other designers to do the same. With 10+ years in AI, he brings depth that most "AI designers" don't have.

## Content and platforms

- Website: https://www.billiecavallaro.com
- Newsletter (AI + Design Weekly): Published weekly on Substack — https://substack.com/@billiecavallaro
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/billiecavallaro/
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/billiefun
- Dribbble: https://dribbble.com/BillieCavallaro
- Medium: https://medium.com/@billiejocavallaro

## Topics I cover

AI in design, AI agents, DesignOps, design systems, product design leadership, AI strategy for non-technical teams, design education, AI tools for designers, UX for financial services, entrepreneurship, personal brand in the AI era.
